de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Class TacletConditions

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions.TacletConditions

  •  class TacletConditions
extends Object
    This class is used for wrapping all variable conditions of a taclet in one object.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<AbstractOrInterfaceType> abstractInterfaceCondition 
      private ImmutableList<ArrayComponentTypeCondition> arrayComponentCondition 
      private ImmutableList<TypeComparisonCondition> comparisionCondition 
      static int FALSE 
      static int NULL_ILLEGAL 
      static int NULL_LEGAL 
      private ImmutableList<TypeCondition> typeCondition 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TacletConditions(Taclet t) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean conatainsComparisionConditionSymmetric(Sort s1, Sort s2, TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)
      Does the same like containsComparisionCondition with the difference, that the order of s1 and s2 is not important.
      boolean containsAbstractInterfaceCondition(Sort s)
      Checks whether the conditions contains a "\isAbstractOrInterface" condition for the sort s.
      private boolean containsAbstractInterfaceCondition(Sort s, boolean negated) 
      boolean containsComparisionCondition(Sort s1, Sort s2, TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)
      Returns whether the taclet has a type comparision condition according to the sorts s1 and s2.
      REMARK: The right order of s1 and s2 is important.
      private boolean containsComparisionCondition(TypeComparisonCondition tcc, Sort s1, Sort s2, TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode) 
      boolean containsIsReferenceArray(Term t) 
      int containsIsReferenceCondition(Sort s)
      Returns whether the taclet has a "isReference"-condition.
      boolean containsIsSubtypeRelation(Sort gen, Sort inst, TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode) 
      boolean containsNotAbstractInterfaceCondition(Sort s)
      Checks whether the conditions contains a "\not\isAbstractOrInterface" condition for the sort s.
      boolean containsNotSameCondition(Sort s1, Sort s2)
      Checks whether the conditions contains the "notSame"-condition with the corresponding sorts s1 and s2.

    • Method Detail

      • containsIsReferenceArray

        public boolean containsIsReferenceArray(Term t)

      • containsNotAbstractInterfaceCondition

        public boolean containsNotAbstractInterfaceCondition(Sort s)
        Checks whether the conditions contains a "\not\isAbstractOrInterface" condition for the sort s.
        Parameters:
        s -
        Returns:
        true if there is such a condition, otherwise false.

      • containsAbstractInterfaceCondition

        public boolean containsAbstractInterfaceCondition(Sort s)
        Checks whether the conditions contains a "\isAbstractOrInterface" condition for the sort s.
        Parameters:
        s -
        Returns:
        true if there is such a condition, otherwise false.

      • containsAbstractInterfaceCondition

        private boolean containsAbstractInterfaceCondition(Sort s,
                                         boolean negated)

      • containsNotSameCondition

        public boolean containsNotSameCondition(Sort s1,
                               Sort s2)
        Checks whether the conditions contains the "notSame"-condition with the corresponding sorts s1 and s2.
        Parameters:
        s1 -
        s2 -
        Returns:
        true if there is such a condition, otherwise false.

      • conatainsComparisionConditionSymmetric

        public boolean conatainsComparisionConditionSymmetric(Sort s1,
                                             Sort s2,
                                             TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)
        Does the same like containsComparisionCondition with the difference, that the order of s1 and s2 is not important.

      • containsComparisionCondition

        public boolean containsComparisionCondition(Sort s1,
                                   Sort s2,
                                   TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)
        Returns whether the taclet has a type comparision condition according to the sorts s1 and s2.
        REMARK: The right order of s1 and s2 is important. For symmetric conditions like "notSame" use containsNotSameConditionSymmetric.
        Parameters:
        s1 -
        s2 -
        mode - see TypeComparisonCondition
        Returns:
        true if the taclet contains the condition, otherwise false.

      • containsComparisionCondition

        private boolean containsComparisionCondition(TypeComparisonCondition tcc,
                                   Sort s1,
                                   Sort s2,
                                   TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)

      • containsIsSubtypeRelation

        public boolean containsIsSubtypeRelation(Sort gen,
                                Sort inst,
                                TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)

      • containsIsReferenceCondition

        public int containsIsReferenceCondition(Sort s)
        Returns whether the taclet has a "isReference"-condition.
        Parameters:
        s - the sort according to the "isReference"-condition.
        Returns:
        returns 0 if there is no "isReference"-condition, else a value greater than 0:
        - FALSE: the taclet has no "isReference"-condition according to the given sort s.
        - NULL_LEGAL: the taclet has a "isReference"-condition, where null is allowed.
        - NULL_ILLEGAL: the taclet has a "isRefernce"-condition, where null is not allowed.
